human_verification.notes: Validated personal-care-specific billing boundaries, merchant-of-record and gratuity handling, PCI-safe payment controls, reconciliation and denial handling, med-spa routing, and deployment and commercialization completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to personal-care billing-readiness, posting support, reconciliation, and financial exception handling rather than generic accounting or merchant-services administration.

Authority sources anchor the pack in CDTFA beauty-business tax guidance, IRS cosmetology and tip-reporting rules, PCI payment-data controls, ISPA spa workflow terminology, and TDLR medical-spa boundary guidance.

Scenarios validate unsupported charges, missing posting documentation, settlement mismatches, denied or disputed payments, unsafe payment-data retention, generic-industry overreach, and med-spa escalation.

The package requires named personal-care records such as appointment books, service tickets, POS receipts, tip logs, processor batches, booth-renter records, and package or gift-card ledgers before the lane can act.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the package artifacts.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation results and readiness evidence.

notes: The specialist is validated as a spec pack and does not claim retained-implementation runtime behavior.

Promotion to a retained implementation should happen only after repeated usage confirms stable retrieval of booking, POS, settlement, gratuity, and approval records with low false-confidence escalation rates.
